text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the end of summer camp, and many
of the Umamusume seem down as they board the
bus to return home.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why do you try to get on the bus every year? No
trainer of mine is going home that way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why do you try to get on the bus every year? No
trainer of mine is going home that way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You'd miss out on the extreme breeze as we ride
Tata back home!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, if we don't hurry, we'll be late! We can't
let the bus beat us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, this year's summer camp concludes safely.
(But I suppose that remains to be seen for me...)
